Artyom Yagovdik

Engineering Lead, Software Architect

Frankfurt, Germany

Building commerce platforms for Enterprise Retail & Luxury brands. Ten years of shipping systems that handle serious traffic.

Currently focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS infrastructure. I bridge the gap between business ROI and robust, scalable code.

Selected Projects

  • Sento — Chrome extension for AI-powered text rewriting
  • Synto — Clean Markdown extraction for LLM workflows
  • Nemo — Privacy-first password manager with biometric unlock
